creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Eimar,

updates to existing ports are preferred in (unified) diff format, as
described in the Porter's Handbook (see [1]), since that makes it easier
to see what changed and to apply the changes. Could you send a followup to
this PR with your changes attached as a diff?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/port-upgrading.html
